## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and which issue they fix/address. Include relevant motivation and context. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (changes to README, contributing guide, etc.)
- [ ] Chore / code cleanup / package update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] **Local Build**: App builds successfully without TypeScript or build-time lint errors (`npm run build`).
- [ ] **Database Migration**: Verified migration runs and tables are updated (if model changed).
- [ ] **Sensor Fusion**: Verified sensor checks on mobile/desktop simulator (if sensor code changed).
- [ ] **UI Review**: Verified visual changes in light and dark mode, responsive layouts.

## Screenshots / Screen Recordings (if UI changes made)

*Please paste screenshots or drag-and-drop video screen recordings showing the UI before and after your changes.*

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules.
